ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_forms" (
  "pokemon_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon form */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the form belongs to */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon form */,
  "form_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the Pokémon form */,
  "is_shiny" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the form is shiny */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_forms_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the Pokémon (e.g., Fire, Water, Grass) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* The generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* JSON array of abilities the Pokémon can have */,
  "hidden_ability" TEXT /* The hidden ability of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* The base experience gained for defeating the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokeathlon_stats" (
  "pokeathlon_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pokeathlon stat */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the pokeathlon stat (e.g., Speed, Power, Endurance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pokeathlon stat */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the stat */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the stat in overall performance calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokeathlon_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_stats" (
  "pokemon_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon stat */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the stat belongs to */,
  "pokeathlon_stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pokeathlon stat the stat belongs to */,
  "minimum_stat" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the stat */,
  "base_stat" INTEGER /* Base value of the stat */,
  "maximum_stat" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the stat */,
  "stat_growth_rate" TEXT /* The growth rate of the stat */,
  "evolution_stat_change" TEXT /* JSON object detailing how the stat changes upon evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_stats_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_stats_pokeathlon_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokeathlon_stat_id") REFERENCES pokeathlon_stats ("pokeathlon_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the trainer */,
  "trainer_type" TEXT /* The type of trainer (e.g., Beginner, Expert) */,
  "trainer_rank" TEXT /* The rank of the trainer */,
  "trainer_badges" TEXT /* JSON array of badges the trainer has earned */,
  "trainer_bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the trainer */,
  "trainer_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the trainer's avatar image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who owns the Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being owned */,
  "pokemon_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon form being owned */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date the trainer acquired the Pokémon */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* The current level of the Pokémon */,
  "current_experience" INTEGER /* The current experience points of the Pokémon */,
  "last_battle_date" TEXT /* The date of the last battle the Pokémon participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ownership_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ownership_pokemon_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_form_id") REFERENCES pokemon_forms ("pokemon_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ownership_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_plans" (
  "training_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training plan */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who created the plan */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being trained */,
  "pokeathlon_stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pokeathlon stat being targeted */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the stat */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* The status of the training plan (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "plan_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the training plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_plans_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_plans_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_plans_pokeathlon_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokeathlon_stat_id") REFERENCES pokeathlon_stats ("pokeathlon_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "training_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training plan the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "current_value" INTEGER /* Current value of the stat being tracked */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the progress record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_progress_training_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_plan_id") REFERENCES training_plans ("training_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution record */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that evolved */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, item use) */,
  "evolution_date" TEXT /* Date the evolution occurred */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the Pokémon evolved */,
  "evolution_item_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the item used for evolution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolution_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_lines" (
  "evolution_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution line */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that evolves */,
  "evolves_into_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that the first Pokémon evolves into */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, item use) */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the Pokémon evolves */,
  "evolution_item_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the item required for evolution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_lines_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_lines_evolution_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_lines_evolves_into_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolves_into_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* The type of item (e.g., Poke Ball, Medicine) */,
  "item_effect" TEXT /* A description of the item's effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who used the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the item was used */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the item was used on */,
  "usage_effect" TEXT /* A description of the effect the item had */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_usage_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_usage_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_usage_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
